description_long: This is a Sony PlayStation controller, specifically modeled after the DualShock series. The device features a matte black plastic body with two ergonomic hand grips, a central panel with the Sony and PlayStation logos, and a set of distinctive buttons including a D-pad, four action buttons (triangle, circle, cross, square), two analog sticks, and Start/Select buttons. The top edge houses two pairs of shoulder buttons (L1/L2 and R1/R2), which are slightly raised and textured for tactile feedback. The controller's surface is smooth with a slight sheen, and the buttons are color-coded for easy identification. The overall design is compact and contoured to fit comfortably in the hands, with all controls easily accessible for gaming.
description: A black Sony PlayStation DualShock controller with ergonomic grips, color-coded buttons, and dual analog sticks. The surface is smooth and slightly glossy, with prominent branding and functional controls.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Sony and PlayStation logos, D-pad, four action buttons, two analog sticks, and Start/Select buttons.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the ergonomic grip and the profile of the shoulder buttons.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the hand grips and the raised shoulder buttons.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other ergonomic grip and the side profile of the buttons.
